final_text: {"file":"django/forms/fields.py","class":"FileField","method":"clean","parent_class":"Field","fix_summary":"The `clean()` method sits above `to_python()` and handles all three states: it raises a `ValidationError` with the `FILE_INPUT_CONTRADICTION` error when the widget returns the sentinel `FILE_INPUT_CONTRADICTION` value (a new file and 'clear' were both indicated), returns `False` when the user clicked 'clear' (state b), falls back to the `initial` value when no new data was submitted (state c), and only delegates to `super().clean()` — which calls `to_python()` — when an actual new file upload is present (state a)."}

parsed_answer.fix_summary: The `clean()` method sits above `to_python()` and handles all three states: it raises a `ValidationError` with the `FILE_INPUT_CONTRADICTION` error when the widget returns the sentinel `FILE_INPUT_CONTRADICTION` value (a new file and 'clear' were both indicated), returns `False` when the user clicked 'clear' (state b), falls back to the `initial` value when no new data was submitted (state c), and only delegates to `super().clean()` — which calls `to_python()` — when an actual new file upload is present (state a).
